title: AI Genealogy Tree
description: JSON Schema for the portable AI genealogy tree data model. Validates data/tree.json.

PersonId.description: Person identifier. Primary format is @I<digits>@. Synthetic IDs use @I_<NAME>@ or @I_FS_*@.

Event.description: A life event (birth, death, marriage, etc.).

date_original.description: Date as it appeared in the original source, before normalization.

place.description: Place as recorded (town, county, state, country).

confidence.description: Confidence in the specific event data.

Source.description: A single source attached to a person as evidence.

name.description: Short human-readable label for this source (e.g., '1850 US Census, Albemarle Co, VA').

title.description: Full title of the source collection or record.

tier.description: Source quality tier: 1=Official records/vital, 2=Census/church registers, 3=Published genealogies, 4=Oral history/derivative, 5=Online trees (leads only).

platform.description: Platform or repository where this source was found (e.g., 'FamilySearch', 'Ancestry', 'WikiTree', 'FHL').

added.description: ISO 8601 date when this source was attached (e.g., '2025-03-15').

proves.description: What fact this source establishes (e.g., 'birth 1850 Virginia', 'father John Smith').

evidence_type.description: Direct evidence names the fact explicitly; indirect requires inference; negative records absence.

ark.description: Persistent ARK URL linking to the digitized record (preferred) or source page.

url.description: URL to the source record (use 'ark' for FamilySearch ARK links).

Validation.description: Research quality metadata for a person.

confidence.description: Canonical confidence level. VERIFIED=well-sourced; PROBABLE=probably correct; POSSIBLE=plausible but weakly sourced; UNVERIFIED=data quality flag.

source_count.description: Must equal len(evidence.sources). Maintained for quick access without iterating sources.

concerns.description: List of open research concerns. Prefix with 'RESOLVED: ' to close a concern.

corrections_applied.description: Log of corrections made to this person's data (append-only).

dna_evidence.description: If set, DNA confirmation protects this person from automated confidence demotion.

parent_confidence.description: Per-parent confidence metadata (father/mother keys with source lists).

gps_status.description: Genealogical Proof Standard compliance: COMPLIANT, PARTIAL, or NOT_EVALUATED.

evidence.description: Container for source list and evidence metadata.

source_count.description: Must equal len(sources). Redundant with validation.source_count for legacy reasons.

sources.description: All sources attached to this person as evidence.

ResearchStatus.description: Research completeness tracking for a person.

parents_known.description: Whether both parents have been identified.

brick_wall.description: True if further research has been exhausted with no parent found.

brick_wall_reason.description: Explanation of why the line cannot be extended further.

archive_needed.description: True if offline archive / onsite research is required.

Person.description: A single ancestor, descendant, or collateral person in the tree.

id.description: Unique person identifier within this tree.

canonical_name.description: Full name in preferred research form (e.g., 'John SMITH').

generation.description: Ahnentafel generation number. Generation 1 = primary subject; each generation back doubles.

father_id.description: ID of this person's father in the tree, or null if unknown.

mother_id.description: ID of this person's mother in the tree, or null if unknown.

lineage_part.description: Which branch of the pedigree this person belongs to (1–16 for a 4-generation pedigree). Null for collateral persons.

notes.description: Free-text research notes for this person.

name_variants.description: Alternate spellings or forms of the name found in records.

confidence.description: LEGACY field. The canonical confidence is validation.confidence. This top-level field is present on a small number of older records and should not be written to.

title.description: Human-readable title for the tree (e.g., 'Wiley Family Tree').

created.description: ISO 8601 date/datetime when the tree file was first created.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date/datetime of the most recent modification.

primary_person_id.description: ID of the primary subject of the tree (the proband).

person_count.description: Declared number of persons (for quick reference; may differ from actual list length).

schema_version.description: Version of this data model schema.

persons.description: All persons in the tree as a flat list (not a dict). Iterate with: for p in tree['persons'].

relationships.description: Optional explicit relationship records (e.g., for non-biological or complex relationships).
